title: Splashing with confidence
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - For Gracious Mukucha...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - For Gracious Mukucha (25), taking to water at first was a challenge. But on Monday 1 December her plunge into the ocean at Central Beach in Plett, during the monthly Sunrise Dippers event, was a milestone.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - For Gracious Mukucha (25), taking to water at first was a challenge. But on Monday 1 December her plunge into the ocean at Central Beach in Plett, during the monthly Sunrise Dippers event, was a milestone."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As part of the Adopt a Swimmer programme, Gracious, along with a group of her peers, splashed into the ocean for the first time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She first heard about Adopt a Swimmer from someone she met where she lives in Keurbooms.","html":"She first heard about Adopt a Swimmer from someone she met where she lives in Keurbooms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Someone took me to Plett to swim - and I got sponsorship from nowhere… Now I love the sea,\" said Gracious.","html":"\"Someone took me to Plett to swim - and I got sponsorship from nowhere… Now I love the sea,\" said Gracious."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Conduit for healingAdopt a Swimmer, a non-profit organisation in Plettenberg Bay, was founded by Louise Auersberg in 2011 as a way to help children at risk and who face economic disadvantages.","html":"Conduit for healing
Adopt a Swimmer, a non-profit organisation in Plettenberg Bay, was founded by Louise Auersberg in 2011 as a way to help children at risk and who face economic disadvantages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Auersberg's own struggles dealing with a learning disability and facing many obstacles inspired her to use water as a conduit for healing.","html":"Auersberg's own struggles dealing with a learning disability and facing many obstacles inspired her to use water as a conduit for healing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For her, swimming is a powerful metaphor for facing challenges head-on and pushing through adversity. She realised she could combine her love for both water and helping children."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Being able to swim saves lives, prevents accidents, and gives joy. Swimming together creates healthy, active communities that love each other, the water and nature,\" says Auersberg.","html":"\"Being able to swim saves lives, prevents accidents, and gives joy. Swimming together creates healthy, active communities that love each other, the water and nature,\" says Auersberg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For her, Gracious' story is an example of what Adopt a Swimmer can achieve.","html":"For her, Gracious' story is an example of what Adopt a Swimmer can achieve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Louise Auersberg and Gracious Mukucha ... leading by example. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Louise Auersberg and Gracious Mukucha ... leading by example. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adopt a Swimmer swim students enjoy splashing in the waves. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Adopt a Swimmer swim students enjoy splashing in the waves. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Adopt A Swimmer celebrates first-ever adult graduates","Splash for Christmas"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
